FROM IBANKFX.FX_TXN_AGREEMENTS fta 
WHERE fta.CREATED_BY = '28980'
AND fta.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'REJECTED', 'APPROVED' )
AND fta.TXN_DATE= TRUNC(sysdate)
and fta.EFFECTIVE_DATE_TO>sysdate
and fta.IS_USED= '0'
AND fta.CIF_NO = '123456123456'
ORDER BY fta.CREATED_DATE desc;
